title: AdminX
description: Modern GUI tools for server administrators
body:
# 🎮 AdminX - Professional Administration Suite

> **The ultimate all-in-one administration plugin with intuitive GUI for Minecraft 1.21-1.21.5**

---

## 📖 Overview

**AdminX** is a comprehensive administration plugin designed to simplify server management through beautiful, intuitive GUI interfaces. Say goodbye to memorizing dozens of commands - everything you need is just a click away!

Whether you're managing players, monitoring server performance, or moderating your community, AdminX provides all the tools you need in one powerful, user-friendly package.

---

## ✨ Key Features

### 🎯 **7 Main Management Categories**

#### 🎮 **Player Management**
- Complete player control panel with real-time online player list
- Game mode switching (Survival, Creative, Adventure, Spectator)
- Health, hunger, and experience management
- Inventory viewing and editing
- Ender chest access
- Potion effects management
- Teleportation tools (to player, player to you, coordinates)
- God mode, fly mode, and freeze features
- Speed adjustments (movement and flight)
- Player invisibility toggle
- Punishment history viewer

#### 🌍 **World Management**
- Time control (set, freeze, day/night toggle)
- Weather control (clear, rain, thunder, freeze)
- Difficulty settings
- GameRules editor with descriptions
- Multi-world teleportation
- Entity cleanup (items, mobs, arrows, etc.)
- Chunk management
- World border controls
- Explosion and fire damage toggles
- Mob spawn management

#### ⚙️ **Server Utilities**
- Real-time TPS monitor with history
- Server information dashboard
- Plugin manager (enable, disable, reload)
- Backup system (create, restore, manage)
- World management (load, unload, teleport)
- Whitelist manager
- Operator management
- Server restart scheduler
- Console command executor
- Task scheduler for automated commands
- Memory management tools

#### 🛡️ **Moderation Suite**
- Comprehensive punishment database
- Ban manager (temporary, permanent, IP bans)
- Mute manager with duration support
- Warning system with counters
- Admin action logging
- Player report system
- Chat filter with auto-moderation
- Spectator mode for monitoring
- Player freeze for investigations
- Punishment history tracking

#### 📊 **Statistics & Analytics**
- Online player graphs over time
- Top player leaderboards (playtime, kills, deaths)
- Player action statistics
- Economy overview (with Vault integration)
- Player database with search
- First join and last seen tracking
- Session and total playtime
- Achievement completion statistics

#### 🎁 **Items & Economy**
- Item spawner with search functionality
- NBT tag editor
- Custom item creator and manager
- Item kit system (create, edit, distribute)
- Enchantment editor (any level)
- Item renaming with color codes
- Repair tools (hand or full inventory)
- Item duplication
- Player head library
- Economy balance management (Vault support)
- Admin shop creator

#### 🔧 **Plugin Settings**
- Permission management interface
- Multi-language support (Russian, English)
- GUI color scheme customization
- Sound settings
- Action logging configuration
- Auto-save settings
- Update checker
- Configuration export/import
- Built-in documentation

---

## 🎨 GUI Features

### **Beautiful & Intuitive Interface**
- 🖼️ Custom item icons and player heads
- 🔍 Search and filter functionality
- 📄 Pagination for long lists
- ✅ Confirmation dialogs for dangerous actions
- 🔔 Sound feedback for actions
- 📱 Mobile-friendly design
- ⚡ Fast and responsive

### **Quick Actions**
- Hotkey support for frequent tasks
- Action history
- Customizable quick access panel
- Macro system for action sequences

---

## 🚀 Installation

1. Download the latest version of AdminX
2. Place the `.jar` file in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configure settings in `plugins/AdminX/config.yml`
5. Use `/adminx` to open the main menu!

---

## 📝 Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/adminx` or `/ax` | Open main GUI menu | `adminx.gui` |
| `/adminx reload` | Reload plugin configuration | `adminx.reload` |
| `/adminx help` | Display help information | `adminx.help` |
| `/adminx version` | Show plugin version | `adminx.version` |

---

## 🔐 Permissions

### **Main Permissions**
```
adminx.*                    # Access to all features
adminx.gui                  # Access to GUI menus
adminx.player.*             # All player management features
adminx.world.*              # All world management features
adminx.server.*             # All server utility features
adminx.moderation.*         # All moderation features
adminx.stats.*              # All statistics features
adminx.items.*              # All item management features
adminx.settings.*           # All plugin settings
```

### **Detailed Permissions**
Full permission list available in documentation. Format: `adminx.category.action`

Supports wildcard permissions and integrates with:
- ✅ Placeholder API
---

## 🔧 Requirements

- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21 - 1.21.5
- **Server Software:** Spigot, Paper, or Purpur (recommended)
- **Java Version:** 21 or higher

### **Optional Dependencies**
- **PlaceholderAPI** - For placeholder support in messages and GUI

---

## 🌐 Multi-Language Support

- 🇷🇺 Russian
- 🇺🇸 English

All messages fully customizable in `messages.yml`

---

## 🎯 Performance

- ⚡ Asynchronous operations for heavy tasks
- 💾 Smart caching system
- 🔄 Lazy loading for large datasets
- 📈 Optimized for large servers (500+ players)
- 🎮 No lag, no performance impact

---

## 🛡️ Security Features

- Input validation for all actions
- Confirmation dialogs for dangerous operations
- Complete admin action logging
- Automatic config backups
- Permission-based access control
- Protection against command injection

---

## 📦 What's Included

- ✅ Fully functional plugin (production-ready)
- ✅ Comprehensive documentation
- ✅ Example configuration files with comments
- ✅ Regular updates and bug fixes
- ✅ Active support

---

## 🔄 Upcoming Features

- 🌐 Discord integration for notifications
- 💻 Web panel for remote management
- 📊 Advanced analytics dashboard
- 🎨 Custom particle effects
- 🖼️ Holographic displays
- 🔌 Developer API for plugin integration
